question: Which dataset is ideal for top-k retrieval evaluation because it provides 10 paragraphs with 2 gold and 8 distractors?
Which dataset was introduced with MADAM-RAG and is purpose-built for multi-agent debate with misinformation and noise documents?

Which paper motivates the multi-agent debate and centralized aggregator used to resolve conflicting evidence?
Which paper motivates generating evidence sentences and self-critique at Stage 6?
What two datasets were selected to cover top-k retrieval benchmarking and conflict-heavy multi-document QA?
What alpha value corresponds to the hybrid retrieval setting in the ablation?
Which retrieval setting is expected to outperform both BM25-only and dense-only on Recall@K?
What metric measures whether the gold documents are present in the retrieved top-k set?
What metric checks whether gold documents rank above misinformation documents after reranking?
How many debate rounds are expected to give the best misinformation suppression without the latency cost of 3 rounds?
Which stage computes faithfulness and hallucination metrics inspired by RAGChecker?
Which dataset supports reasoning-chain verification and what field provides the gold evidence?
